rdf:Description.dc:description: Particle-size distribution curves for the three SNU silica sands used in this programme, reconstructed from the d10 / d50 / d60 / fines- content anchor points in manuscript @tbl-soil-properties via monotone PCHIP interpolation on log-diameter. No. 7 (d50 = 0.21 mm) is the test-bed sand for T1-T5; No. 8 (0.15 mm) is the silt-fraction sand used in T3; No. 5 (1.99 mm) is the coarse backfill. USCS textural subdivisions (fines/fine/medium/coarse sand/gravel) shown as faint band boundaries.
